sentence: The move will mean restricting heat-pump subsidies so that only those receiving certain benefits will be allowed to claim them, sharply bringing down costs to the government.
subject: the government

sentence: Education, health and care plans (EHCPs), at the centre of the government’s likely plans to reform Send provision , cost £1,000 more on average than the funding provided to meet the needs described.
subject: Education, health and care plans (EHCPs)
object: the funding provided to meet the needs described
